source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngok6 hei3
cards.english: [Musical instrument]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬太太同豬先生喺度執緊屋啊
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai2 dou6 zap1 gan2 uk1 aa3
cards.english: Mrs. Pig and Mr. Pig are tidying up the house.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我同媽咪喺閣樓度揾到呢個舊盒啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 maa1 mi4 hai2 gok3 lau2 dou6 wan2 dou3 ni1 go3 gau6 hap6 aa3
cards.english: My mom and I found this old box in the attic.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你哋估下盒入面有啲咩吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 gu2 haa6 haap6 jap6 min6 jau5 di1 me1 aa1
cards.english: Can you guess what's inside the box?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 zi1 dou3
cards.english: I don't know.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 入邊有好多唔同嘅樂器㗎
cards.jyutping: jap6 bin6 jau5 hou2 do1 m4 tung4 ge3 ngok6 hei3 gaa4
cards.english: There are many different musical instruments inside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 jau6 gau6 jau6 do1 can4 aa3
cards.english: They are old and dusty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 呢個喺我細個嗰陣拉過嘅小提琴啊
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai2 ngo5 sai3 go3 go2 zan6 laai1 gwo3 ge3 siu2 tai4 kam4 aa3
cards.english: This is the violin that I used to play when I was little.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 媽咪，你可唔可以拉小提琴啊？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 nei5 ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 laai1 siu2 tai4 kam4 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, can you play the violin?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji5 ging1 hou2 noi6 mou5 laai1 gwo3 laa3
cards.english: It's been a long time since I last played it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 嚟啦，媽咪，拉畀我哋聽吖
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1 maa1 mi4 laai1 bei2 ngo5 dei6 ting1 aa1
cards.english: Come on, Mommy, play it for us.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hei1 mong6 zung6 gei3 dak1 dim2 joeng2 laai1 laa1
cards.english: I hope I still remember how to play it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: laai1 dak1 hou2 aa3 hou2 je5
cards.english: - You played well! - Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ho2 ji5 bei2 ngo5 laai1 haa6 maa1
cards.english: Mommy, can I play it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 gam2 joeng2 ling1 zyu6 wo3
cards.english: You have to hold it like this.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 laa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Okay, Mommy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 哎吔，小提琴唔應該係噉嘅聲㗎噃
cards.jyutping: ai1 jaa3 siu2 tai4 kam4 m4 jing1 goi1 hai6 gam2 ge3 sing1 gaa4 bo3
cards.english: Ouch, the violin isn't supposed to sound like that!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jau6 soeng2 si3 haa6
cards.english: George wants to try it again.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 gam2 ling1 aa3
cards.english: You have to hold it like this, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 小提琴都唔應該係噉嘅聲㗎
cards.jyutping: siu2 tai4 kam4 dou1 m4 jing1 goi1 hai6 gam2 ge3 sing1 gaa4
cards.english: The violin isn't supposed to sound like that.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: siu2 tai4 kam4 sat6 zoi6 taai3 naan4 laai1 laa3
cards.english: The violin is too hard to play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa，可能你玩呢個鼓好啲啊
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 nei5 waan2 ni1 go3 gu2 hou2 di1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa, maybe you'll be better off playing this drum.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 de1 dei6
cards.english: Thank you, Daddy!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam2 hou2 ting1 hou2 do1
cards.english: That sounds much better.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 daa2 gu2
cards.english: Peppa loves playing the drums.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: waa1 hou2 hou2 ting1 aa3
cards.english: Wow, that sounds really good!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 di1 sing1 hou2 hou2 ting1 aa3
cards.english: Yeah, the sounds are really nice!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 呢個係爹哋嘅手風琴喎
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 de1 dei6 ge3 sau2 fung1 kam4 wo3
cards.english: This is Daddy's accordion.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我同媽咪第一次見面嗰陣 我試過拉畀佢聽㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 maa1 mi4 dai6 jat1 ci3 gin3 min6 go2 zan6 ngo5 si3 gwo3 laai1 bei2 keoi5 ting1 gaa4
cards.english: I even tried playing it for Mommy when we first met.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 哎吔，爹哋，我仲記得呢首歌啊
cards.jyutping: ai1 jaa3 de1 dei6 ngo5 zung6 gei3 dak1 ne1 sau2 go1 aa3
cards.english: Oh dear, Daddy, I still remember this song.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dou1 soeng2 si3 haa6 laai1 sau2 fung1 kam4
cards.english: George also wants to try playing the accordion.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 soeng2 laai1 aa1
cards.english: Do you really want to play it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: sau2 fung1 kam4 hou2 naan4 laai1 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: The accordion is very difficult to play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 sau2 fung1 kam4
cards.english: George, this is an accordion.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 同我個鼓一樣都係咁難玩㗎
cards.jyutping: tung4 ngo5 go3 gu2 jat1 joeng6 dou1 hai6 gam3 naan4 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: It's as difficult to play as my drum.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1
cards.english: Okay, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 可能George太細個，拉唔到手風琴啊
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 taai3 sai3 go3 laai1 m4 dou3 sau2 fung1 kam4 aa3
cards.english: Maybe George is too young to play the accordion.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋，個盒入面仲有啲咩樂器啊？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 go3 haap6 jap6 min6 zung6 jau5 di1 me1 lok6 hei3 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, what other instruments are in the box?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jau5 ni1 go3 hou6 gok3
cards.english: There's this bugle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ho2 ji5 ceoi1 maa1
cards.english: Can I play it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 hou2 jung6 lik6 gam2 ceoi1 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: You need to blow it really hard.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 ceoi1 m4 dou3 aa3
cards.english: Looks like Peppa can't blow it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gan1 bun2 mou5 ho2 nang4 ceoi1 dou3 aa3
cards.english: It's impossible to blow.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我記得我以前都吹到㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gei3 dak1 ngo5 ji5 cin4 dou1 ceoi1 dou3 gaa4
cards.english: I remember I used to be able to blow it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 睇嚟豬太太都吹唔到啊
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 dou1 ceoi1 m4 dou3 aa3
cards.english: Looks like Mrs. Pig can't blow it either.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我諗要好似我咁大隻先可以吹得響佢啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 jiu3 hou2 ci5 ngo5 gam3 daai6 zek3 sin1 ho2 ji5 ceoi1 dak1 hoeng2 keoi5 aa3
cards.english: I think you have to be as big as me to blow it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 連豬先生都一樣吹唔到喎
cards.jyutping: lin4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dou1 jat1 joeng6 ceoi1 m4 dou3 wo3
cards.english: Even Mr. Pig can't blow it either.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gong2 dak1 ngaam1
cards.english: Peppa is right.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 根本就冇可能吹得響佢
cards.jyutping: gan1 bun2 zau6 mou5 ho2 nang4 ceoi1 dak1 hoeng2 keoi5
cards.english: It's just impossible to blow it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 gan2 jiu3 laa1 de1 dei6
cards.english: It's okay, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 laai1 sau2 fung1 kam4 mai5 dak1 lo1
cards.english: You can just play the accordion.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 laai1 dak1 hou2 hou2 ting1 aa3
cards.english: You play it so well.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 zi6 gei2 zaan3 zi6 gei2 aa3
cards.english: Not to toot my own horn.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zan1 hai6 laai1 dak1 gei2 hou2 ting1 gaa4
cards.english: I really do play it quite well.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 laai1 ngo5 ge3 siu2 tai4 kam4 laa1
cards.english: I'll just play my violin then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 ngo5 zau6 daa2 ngo5 ge3 gu2
cards.english: And I'll play my drums.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 laai1 siu2 tai4 kam4
cards.english: Mrs. Pig plays the violin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 laai1 sau2 fung1 kam4
cards.english: Mr. Pig plays the accordion.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zau6 daa2 gu2
cards.english: Peppa plays the drums.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam2 ho2 ji5 waan2 me1 ne1
cards.english: Then what can George play?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ging2 jin4 ceoi1 hou6 gok3 aa3
cards.english: George is actually playing the trumpet!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ceoi1 m4 hoeng2 go3 hou6 gok3
cards.english: Mommy can't blow the trumpet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋都一樣吹唔響個號角
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 dou1 jat1 joeng6 ceoi1 m4 hoeng2 go3 hou6 gok3
cards.english: Daddy can't blow the trumpet either.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 就連我都吹唔響個號角
cards.jyutping: zau6 lin4 ngo5 dou1 ceoi1 m4 hoeng2 go3 hou6 gok3
cards.english: Even I can't blow the trumpet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E16 Musical Instruments［樂器］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ceoi1 dak1 hoeng2 aa3
cards.english: But George can blow it!
